summary: Applied two surgical seam-polish edits to improve boundary continuity: one at entry to echo Chapter 1's letter-slot handoff and one at exit to lightly cue the temporal bridge into Chapter 3's Christmas-morning opening.
edits: Opening sentence now includes the hall letter slot clicking in the wind to strengthen carryover from Chapter 1's closing image.
Final sentence now adds Noreen's awareness of how few nights remain till Christmas to smooth the transition toward Chapter 3's opening frame.
